milestone_brief: Extend qtawesome icon coverage to the v1 scope deferred from qtawesome-icons-2026q2-e1 (UPL-4 v0). The v0 milestone covered 3 toolbar/dialog buttons (Reset Camera, Screenshot, Reset Defaults) and explicitly deferred: (a) the 7 camera-preset buttons in the View panel (+X, -X, +Y, -Y, +Z, -Z, Isometric), (b) the Wireframe and Show-edges display-toggle checkboxes in the Appearance panel, and (c) a render-spinner icon shown during mesh generation (~0.5s window). This milestone closes (a) and (b); the spinner (c) is the riskiest because it touches re-entrancy (AI-9 _computing guard) and may need its own follow-up — research should flag if spinner integration crosses any AI-9 risk lines or requires extending into the timer/QMovie surface. Reuse the established Pattern-A architecture from qtawesome-icons-2026q2-e1: panel stores theme + qta state, MainWindow calls refresh_icons(theme) on theme change. Icon color routes through _icon_color(theme) returning palette['TEXT_VALUE']. Lazy-import qtawesome via _get_qta() in icons.py to defer the 150-200ms font-cache cost. AI invariants: AI-1 (PySide6 stack), AI-2 (tests stay Qt-free — mock qta module for icon tests), AI-9 (no processEvents added; theme-change is synchronous), AI-11 (any new Qt enum references use fully-qualified form), AI-13 (6-digit hex from palette tokens only). Look at the established icons.py / refresh_icons() patterns from e1 and extend without breaking existing v0 icons. Each panel that gains icons must wire refresh_icons through MainWindow._on_theme_changed and _apply_system_theme. Test coverage: extend tests/test_icons.py with theme-aware tests for each new icon + a regression guard that all existing v0 icons still bind correctly. CONTEXT.md §3 deferred-scope bullet should be updated to reflect what v1 closes (camera presets + display toggles) and what remains deferred (spinner — if still deferred after research). The brief is fully specified; researcher should verify the icon names (mdi6.* or fa5s.*) for camera-preset arrow semantics and display-toggle wireframe/edge icons that are visually distinct, theme-readable at small button sizes, and license-compatible.
research_synthesis: 9 new icon factories in icons.py (7 camera presets via mdi6.axis-{x,y,z}-arrow with rotated=180 for minus; mdi6.axis-arrow for Isometric; mdi6.grid for Wireframe; mdi6.border-outside for Show-edges). Promote view_panel preset btn locals to self._preset_btns dict + self._iso_btn. Add appearance_panel.refresh_icons. Wire from app.py at 3 attach points (init, _on_theme_changed, _apply_system_theme). Spinner deferred to v2 — AI-9 risk with QMovie.updated during processEvents. ~169 LOC.
